Note: Currency granted per prestige (~every 5 min of active play), subject to the CurrencyPerDay cap. Note: for a player doing ~8 prestiges/day, levels beyond ~5 are throttled by the daily cap unless CurrencyPerDay is also leveled - the two tracks gate each other by design.
Daily cap on currency earned from prestige. Costs mirror CurrencyPerPrestige so the pair levels roughly together.

55 pegs x 10 increments each = 550 purchases on one shared cost curve (~1.3%/purchase growth: cost doubles every ~54 buys, 40 -> ~48k at the end). Balls hit ~7 pegs/drop. BonusValue = per-peg point value at each peg tier (1 base -> 11 max). Players who upgrade center pegs first get the best return since center pegs are hit most often.

8 buckets x 10 tier-ups each = 80 purchases on one shared cost curve (~8.8%/purchase growth, 160 -> ~125k). BonusValue = bucket multiplier at each tier. The x10 -> x20 -> x50 top tiers are the whale-side power spike: they roughly 4x drop value across the final ~16 purchases, which is what lets a 9-pack buyer clear the full reward track on day 5.
Ball generator spawns a free ball every X seconds (30s -> 20s = +50% free ball income at max).

Offline container cap. 30 balls = 15 min of generation at base speed; 60 = 20 min at max speed. Kept cheap (real value for players who check in a few times a day, not pure QoL: it directly gates offline income). Fixed to 11 values to match MaxLevel.
